steps.title: Spot the goal: emphasize a difference
steps.content: The question explicitly asks to emphasize a DIFFERENCE between Ricky Quiñones and John Catchings. The notes reveal the key distinction: they played different instruments—guitar versus cello.

steps.title: Apply contrast language to distinguish the musicians
steps.content: B directly contrasts the two musicians using but and whereas to highlight their different instruments. The others either emphasize their similarity, omit one musician, or redirect focus to the albums. That matches choice B — B is correct.
